text:
AFP - Agence France Presse



Members of Algeria's Olympics delegation threw roses into the river Seine during Friday's Games opening ceremony in memory of the victims of the deadly repression of independence protesters in Paris in 1961.

The Barron's news department was not involved in the creation of the content above. This article was produced by AFP. For more information go toAFP.com.© Agence France-Presse
title: Algeria Olympic Delegation Pays Rose Tribute To 'Massacre' Victims- Barron's
author: AFP - Agence France Presse
description: Members of Algeria's Olympics delegation threw roses into the river Seine during Friday's Games opening ceremony in memory of the victims of the deadly repression of independence protesters in Paris in 1961.
